title: SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: OREGON STATE SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE PROGRAM SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling and assistance through a state office helpline or a one-on-one telephone appointment with a trained SHIBA volunteer to help select a Medicare prescription drug plan, compare Medicare Advantage Plans, compare Medicare Supplement Plans, and apply for Medicare Savings Programs, including Extra Help with Medicare Prescription Drug coverage. Provides assistance with reviewing medical bills and filing appeals or complaints. Trained Medicare specialists also act on behalf of the Senior Medicare Patrol (SMP), which helps detect and report Medicare fraud. 500 Summer Street NE E-12 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (800) 722-4134 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 722-4134 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Health Insurance Claims Assistance for Beneficiaries Medicare Information/Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE PROGRAM
